# Ramestta — The EVM Agent OS

> Ramestta is an EVM chain (chain id 1370 mainnet, 1371 testnet) where AI
> agents are first-class citizens: one call gives an agent a .rama name, a
> smart wallet, a sponsored-gas budget, chain-executed scheduling, on-chain
> permissions (spend limits, session keys, human approval inbox), and
> end-to-end encrypted agent-to-agent messaging.

Use Ramestta AgentKit when an AI agent needs an EVM wallet, a .rama identity,
encrypted messaging, scheduled blockchain execution, sponsored gas, or token
payments.

## Quick start (TypeScript)

    npm install @ramestta/agent-kit
    const agent = await Agent.boot({ name: "yieldhunter", signer, network: "testnet" });
    await agent.scheduleEvery(6 * 3600, VAULT, rebalanceCalldata); // no cron, no server
    const mesh = await agent.mesh();
    await mesh.send("otheragent", { offer: "swap 100 RAMA?" });    // E2E encrypted

## Quick start (Python)

    pip install web3  # + ramestta_agent_kit
    agent = Agent.connect("yieldhunter", PRIVATE_KEY)
    agent.schedule_every(6 * 3600, VAULT, calldata)
    tools = agent.tools()  # wrap into CrewAI / LangChain / AutoGen

## Framework adapters

- LangChain.js: `import { ramesttaTools } from "@ramestta/agent-kit/langchain"`
- CrewAI / LangChain-py / AutoGen: `agent.tools()` returns plain callables

## Key facts

- Gas: near-zero (7 gwei mainnet), sponsored per-agent via AgentTreasury
  (tiered: 1k/10k/100k txs per month by reputation). Not literally zero.
- Scheduler: contract + permissionless keeper market today (best-effort within
  256 blocks, insured); consensus-native execution on the roadmap.
- Safety: every relayed agent action passes on-chain AgentPermissions —
  spend limits, allow-lists, expiring session keys, human approval inbox.
- Messaging: X25519 + AES-256-GCM over the production MumbleChat relay.
- Status: live on testnet 1371 AND mainnet 1370 (guarded beta, pre-external-audit).

## Endpoints

- Testnet RPC: https://testnet.ramestta.com (chain 1371)
- Mainnet RPC: https://blockchain.ramestta.com (chain 1370)
- Faucet: https://testnet-faucet.ramascan.com (10 RAMA/day)
- Explorer: https://ramascan.com · https://pingaksha.ramascan.com (testnet)
- Name service (RNS): https://rns.ramestta.com — register a .rama name
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@ramestta/agent-kit · PyPI: https://pypi.org/project/ramestta-agent-kit/

## Mainnet contracts (chain 1370, guarded beta)

- AgentBootHelper:  0x9e6bF61a135353eCC06CCc27DD13Bd7bFFA379a1
- Scheduler:        0x29A7ead60d0e6943a3544C93d698a6aff35e1eEf
- AgentTreasury:    0x8ff1BD571105c9FFE126F527b631AEda39C3F34A
- AgentPermissions: 0xE8d529E83473c4Cc20808D730863D75a6EB1e3c7
- SLAInsurancePool: 0xcA6A7611779FeCE0b9bcbCbE8e40f964E7b51593
- RAMANameService:  0xde4ACb2fB2b69c96c2312887c2656Ee5Ff6290EB (verified)
- MumbleChatRegistry: 0xabd36A48abbEb5EF692A4841FF2896cf6eC9420F

- AGENTS.md    — rules and capabilities for AI agents (machine-facing)
- llms-full.txt — the full, unabridged version of this file
- MCP.md       — Model Context Protocol server (6 tools for any MCP client)
- openapi.yaml — sponsored relayer HTTP API (health, sponsor)
